title: The Bad Joke(Плохая шутка)
description: THE SCARIEST HORROR MOD EVER(100%) arthouse
body:
**READ THE DESCRIPTION BEFORE PLAYING**
# **THE BAD JOKE**
![Joke menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b247eaa3a00260572bfb8232766aef0fcc52b599.jpeg)
# 

**DESCRIPTION OF THE MOD**

The Bad Joke is a horror mod that adds random scary events, unique entities, and a dynamic reputation system that changes based on your actions

Also, if you have a phone, it can respond to some phrases in the chat. The mod supports 2 languages: Russian and English.

Reputation Types:

1. BAD - only hostile events and corrupted entities 
2. NORMAL - all events and common entities
3. GOOD - only friendly events and no mod entities

## 
**Warnings:**
- Mod can crash the game
- Mod can interact with your desktop
- Mod can interact with your game window
- Mod can create custom popups
- Mod will grief your world
- **MOD CAN SHUTDOWN YOUR PC** (Cannot be called randomly and can be disabled)
- Mod can create new windows
- All interventions in the OS are completely reversible and safe. It's part of the meta horror
## 
To config the mod: /joke config
# Credits
- N0rix - ideological inspirer
- Kuper - Title menu artist
- Inspired by The Broken Script
